limitation: Reuters could not establish that the IRGC and UAE statements referred to the same vessels, and neither the bypass intent nor Iranian attribution is independently demonstrated; the accessible URL is a Reuters syndication mirror.
observation: Reuters names Mombasa and Al Bahiyah as two Emirati-linked tankers struck in the southern Hormuz lane in Omani waters; the UAE reported cruise missiles, casualties, fires, and material damage, while the IRGC separately claimed two offending tankers ignored warnings and used a mined route.
